title: Haryana High Court Clerk Vacancy 2026, Apply Online For 1265 Posts -
short_info: Haryana High Court Clerk Vacancy 2026: Haryana High Court, Chandigarh (Haryana) has issued a notification for the position of Clerk. The recruitment drive comprises 1265 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 23-06-2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the Haryana High Court Clerk Vacancy 2026 recruitment is provided below.

vacancy_details.eligibility: Any Graduation Degree, English Typing : 30 wpm, Computer Knowledge.

how_to_apply: Visit the official website Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position.
